queries.question: What is the percentage distribution of annual revenue per occupational category?
queries.sql:
SELECT 
    Primary_Industry,
    SUM(AnnualRevenue) AS RevenuePerOccupationalDistribution,
    (SUM(AnnualRevenue) * 100.0) / SUM(SUM(AnnualRevenue)) OVER () AS PercentageOfTotalAnnualRevenue
FROM 
    Industries
GROUP BY 
    Primary_Industry;
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/demographics#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/demographics/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?pi ?rev ((?rev*100.0)/?total AS ?pct) WHERE { { SELECT ?pi (SUM(xsd:double(?r)) AS ?rev) WHERE { ?x a :Industries ; p:Primary_Industry ?pi ; p:AnnualRevenue ?r } GROUP BY ?pi } { SELECT (SUM(xsd:double(?r2)) AS ?total) WHERE { ?y a :Industries ; p:AnnualRevenue ?r2 } } }
queries.note: override OK (NL-intent GT): window SUM(SUM) OVER () = % of total; per-industry SUM + grand-total subquery

queries.question: What is the percentage distribution of annual revenue per occupational category?
queries.sql:
SELECT 
    Most_Common_Job,
    SUM(AnnualRevenue) AS RevenuePerOccupationalDistribution,
    (SUM(AnnualRevenue) * 100.0) / SUM(SUM(AnnualRevenue)) OVER () AS PercentageOfTotalAnnualRevenue
FROM 
    Industries
GROUP BY 
    Most_Common_Job;
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/demographics#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/demographics/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?mcj ?rev ((?rev*100.0)/?total AS ?pct) WHERE { { SELECT ?mcj (SUM(xsd:double(?r)) AS ?rev) WHERE { ?x a :Industries ; p:Most_Common_Job ?mcj ; p:AnnualRevenue ?r } GROUP BY ?mcj } { SELECT (SUM(xsd:double(?r2)) AS ?total) WHERE { ?y a :Industries ; p:AnnualRevenue ?r2 } } }
queries.note: override OK (NL-intent GT): window % of total, grouped by Most_Common_Job

queries.question: What is the percentage distribution of annual revenue per occupational category?
queries.sql:
SELECT 
    Primary_Industry, Most_Common_Job,
    SUM(AnnualRevenue) AS RevenuePerOccupationalDistribution,
    (SUM(AnnualRevenue) * 100.0) / SUM(SUM(AnnualRevenue)) OVER () AS PercentageOfTotalAnnualRevenue
FROM 
    Industries
GROUP BY 
    Primary_Industry, Most_Common_Job;
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/demographics#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/demographics/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?pi ?mcj ?rev ((?rev*100.0)/?total AS ?pct) WHERE { { SELECT ?pi ?mcj (SUM(xsd:double(?r)) AS ?rev) WHERE { ?x a :Industries ; p:Primary_Industry ?pi ; p:Most_Common_Job ?mcj ; p:AnnualRevenue ?r } GROUP BY ?pi ?mcj } { SELECT (SUM(xsd:double(?r2)) AS ?total) WHERE { ?y a :Industries ; p:AnnualRevenue ?r2 } } }
queries.note: override OK (NL-intent GT): window % of total, grouped by Primary_Industry + Most_Common_Job

queries.question: What is the average annual revenue per employee for each unique combination of industry ID and occupational distribution?
queries.sql:
SELECT 
    IndustryID, 
    Primary_Industry,
    SUM(AnnualRevenue) / SUM(NumberOfEmployees) AS AnnualRevenuePerEmployee
FROM 
    Industries
GROUP BY 
    IndustryID, Primary_Industry;

What is the percentage distribution of annual revenue per occupational category?
